content:
Depends what one considers play.

Each knife requires a certain amount of attention. A very particular amount.

Each knife I hold in my hand and run through the inner webs of my fingers. Never use a sponge.

Each knife is air dried. Then placed back in the exact proper order.

Finally I can take my coat and shoes off.

Finally I could relax.

Organize the hangers and clothes properly. Lazy yesterday. But it's important to keep all that in order. That's where the thread leads--where it starts. You let the closet get un-uniformed and it all falls apart, right from the seams.

Not just the closet, the shoes too. And the tshirts in the drawers. One unfolded this morning as you pulled another shirt out.

Sloppy. Pig. No one dates pigs.

Dinner first. You need to eat.

But how could you.

With a sloppy closet. And an unfolded tshirt.

The drawer pulls out and not only one, but an entire stack of under shirts have one corner folded in. Will cause wrinkles. Wrinkles. Pig.
